task_completion.description: Verify that the 'PreviousCruise' ground station has been deleted.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the GPredict Preferences or Ground Stations list, 'PreviousCruise' is no longer visible.

task_completion.description: Verify the creation of the 'Woods_Hole' ground station with correct coordinates.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A ground station named 'Woods_Hole' is visible in the settings with Latitude 41.5243, Longitude 70.6693 W (or -70.6693), and Altitude 2m.

task_completion.description: Verify the creation of the 'MidAtlantic' ground station with correct coordinates.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A ground station named 'MidAtlantic' is visible in the settings with Latitude 42.0000, Longitude 30.0000 W (or -30.0000), and Altitude 0m.

task_completion.description: Verify the 'WX_Reception' module is configured with the correct satellites and ground station.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A module tab or window named 'WX_Reception' is open, displaying tracking data for NOAA 15, NOAA 18, and NOAA 19. The active ground station for this module should be set to 'Woods_Hole'.

task_completion.description: Verify the 'SatComm' module is configured with the correct satellites and ground station.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A module tab or window named 'SatComm' is open, displaying tracking data for ISS, SO-50, and AO-73. The active ground station for this module should be set to 'MidAtlantic'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the existing 'Amateur' module was not deleted or modified.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Amateur' module tab or window is still present in the main GPredict interface alongside the newly created modules.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the GPredict GUI to make changes.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the GPredict application interface, including dialog boxes like 'Edit Ground Station' or 'Module Options', rather than a terminal window or text editor modifying configuration files directly.

integrity.description: Verify the modules are genuinely created within the application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The 'WX_Reception' and 'SatComm' modules must appear as functional tabs or windows within the GPredict workspace, showing actual satellite tracking views (like polar or map views), not just text typed into a document.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not simply paste the prompt text into a file to simulate completion.
integrity.visual_evidence: The final state should be a working GPredict application with the requested configuration applied to the software's internal settings, not a text file containing the task description.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Woods_Hole ground station: Latitude 41.5243, Longitude -70.6693 (70.6693 W), Altitude 2m. MidAtlantic ground station: Latitude 42.0, Longitude -30.0 (30.0000 W), Altitude 0m. WX_Reception satellites: NOAA 15 (NORAD 25338), NOAA 18 (NORAD 28654), NOAA 19 (NORAD 33591). SatComm satellites: ISS (NORAD 25544), SO-50 (NORAD 27607), AO-73 (NORAD 39444).
